task_completion.description: Open the Power BI Desktop application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Power BI Desktop application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Create a simulation table named Simulation_Units
task_completion.visual_evidence: A table named 'Simulation_Units' is visible in the Data/Fields pane on the right side of the Power BI interface, or a DAX formula generating this table is visible.

task_completion.description: Define DAX measures for the break-even analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Measures such as 'Fixed_Cost', 'Simulated_Revenue', 'Total_Cost', or 'Simulated_Profit' are visible under a table in the Data/Fields pane, or a DAX formula for one of these measures is visible in the formula bar.
A line chart visual is present on the report canvas, ideally plotting the simulated revenue and total cost.
The title bar of the Power BI window displays 'Breakeven_Analysis' or a 'Save As' dialog is visible with this filename.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used Power BI Desktop to create the report
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Power BI Desktop GUI being used, rather than a text editor or terminal attempting to mock the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Power BI interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Visible actions like clicking on the ribbon, interacting with the canvas, or typing in the DAX formula bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just rename an existing file or use a script to bypass GUI steps
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows the step-by-step creation of the table, measures, and chart within the Power BI GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts: The required visual is a line chart. The parameter range for the simulation table is [0, 3000] with an increment of 10. The fixed cost value must be exactly 25000. Note: The requested data file 'Financial_Sample.xlsx' and product 'Velo' do not actually exist in the environment, so the agent may fail to load the base data or may create mock data to proceed.
